case_title: BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC. VS. DAVID Y CHU et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: WAIVER OF ATTORNEYS' FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENEFIAL FINANCIAL I, INC. SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA, INC.
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-19-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
ORDER -AMENDED- TO CORRECT NAME NUMC PRO TUNC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 15328022) FILED BY ASSIGNEE CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CHU, DAVID Y

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENEFIAL FINANCIAL I, INC. SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHU, DAVID Y $6,120.50 PRINCIPAL, $284.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,405.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC'S MOTION TO CORRECT NAME NUNC PRO TUNC (FROM BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC. TO BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO BENEFICIAL FINANCIAL I INC.) IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion To Correct Name Nunc Pro Tunc
Off Calendar Oct-19-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC'S MOTION TO CORRECT NAME NUNC PRO TUNC (from Beneficial California Inc. to Beneficial California Inc successor by merger to Beneficial Financial I Inc.). No appearances on this matter. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
